purpose: Self-contained listing of M7 proof artifacts for closeout review. Separates substrate evidence (proof of runtime reality and implementation behavior) from report-conformance evidence (tests, scanners, and verification artifacts).

substrate_evidence.description: Proof artifacts that demonstrate actual runtime behavior — what the code does, not what scanners report.

artifacts.what_it_proves: Legitimate internal projection facade. Projects authored workflow DSL pipeline into a neutral Arnold graph shell (CompatibilityPipelineShell) and attaches NativeProgram. This is the canonical mechanism by which Pipeline.native_program is populated for Megaplan pipelines.
artifacts.north_star_alignment: Per Epic North Star: non-null native_program, native trace, route labels, and projected shells are substrate evidence. _compatibility.py is the canonical way to expose the native interface projection.

artifacts.what_it_proves: The arnold.pipeline.legacy compatibility shim is fully removed. Zero production callers existed (confirmed by T1 inventory). No live code references remain outside documentation and archives.

verification.result: Only reference is tests/arnold/pipeline/test_public_contract_imports.py which now asserts ModuleNotFoundError

artifacts.what_it_proves: The DOT-path package arnold/pipelines/megaplan/ (which contained _pipeline/) is fully deleted from disk. No live imports remain.
The _pipeline subtree that contained graph-era executor, bridge, and discovery modules is fully deleted.

Conformance metadata correctly reflects M7 reality: _compatibility is excluded from all four deletion lists (DELETED_IMPORT_MODULES, DELETED_IMPORT_PREFIXES, DELETED_ARTIFACT_PATH_PREFIXES, DELETED_CLI_HELP_FRAGMENTS). Guards for arnold.pipelines.megaplan (DOT), arnold_pipelines.megaplan._pipeline, and arnold_pipelines.megaplan.stages remain intact.

verification.result: Zero results — confirmed removal from all four lists
remaining_guards: arnold.pipelines.megaplan (DOT-path) — kept in all four lists
arnold_pipelines.megaplan._pipeline — kept in import modules, prefixes, artifact paths, CLI help
arnold_pipelines.megaplan.stages — kept in import modules, prefixes, artifact paths, CLI help

report_conformance_evidence.description: Proof artifacts from tests, scanners, and verification runs that confirm correctness of M7 changes.

artifacts.what_it_proves: Comprehensive inventory of all 8 search families requested by M7 plan. Every hit classified as production, test, conformance, docs, archive, or scaffold. Documents zero production callers for arnold.pipeline.legacy, confirms DOT/_pipeline tree deletion, and classifies _compatibility.py as substrate proof (not shim). Identifies conformance misclassification requiring T5 repair.

Public contract imports verified: native-first imports intact, __all__ assertions pass (every name backed by import), graph-era symbols absent from root __all__, and arnold.pipeline.legacy correctly raises ModuleNotFoundError.

CLI run tests repointed to canonical arnold_pipelines.megaplan modules. Subprocess CLI checks invoke arnold_pipelines.megaplan.cli.run inside subprocess — preserving process-boundary coverage without relying on removed __main__ run entry.
Conformance tests pass after T5 _compatibility removal. Confirms deleted DOT and _pipeline surfaces are properly guarded while _compatibility is exempted.

test_results.note: Pre-existing failures: M6 paths still on disk, subagent-launcher DOT-path imports, stale manifest references. Not caused by M7 changes.

artifacts.what_it_proves: Orphaned DOT-path Megaplan tests (test_megaplan_stage_ports.py, test_init_install_ordering.py) archived to tests/archive/m7/. Active DOT test directory is now empty — no test files remain under tests/arnold/pipelines/megaplan/.
artifacts.verification: Both files pass py_compile syntax validation

artifacts.what_it_proves: Dedicated shim smoke test removed alongside arnold.pipeline.legacy. No orphaned test file for deleted module.

cross_references.description: Mapping of M7 tasks to their proof artifacts.

deleted_surfaces_verified: arnold/pipeline/legacy.py — module deleted, zero production callers
arnold/pipelines/megaplan/ — full DOT package tree deleted
tests/arnold/pipelines/megaplan/ — active DOT test directory emptied (archived)
retained_surfaces_verified: arnold_pipelines/megaplan/_compatibility.py — substrate proof, not shim (survives, exempted from deletion lists)
